JUDGE VON BEROLDINGEN, JARNOLD, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 9:24 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLTF. PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. DEFT NOT PRESENT. PLTF. GANPATBHAI B. PATEL SWORN AND TESTIFIED IN HIS BEHALF IN A NARRATIVE FORM. PLTF'S EXH # 1 - 3 DAY NOTICE ID COURT RENDERS RULING ON THE BENCH AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR RESTITUTION OF THE SUBJECT PREM, ALL RENTS/DAMAGES WAIVED AND COSTS WAIVED. WRIT TO ISSUE. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCNULTY, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL STREET, ROOM #412, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL RENTS, DAMAGES AND COSTS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
